slides.title: Cochl AcousticShield
slides.subtitle: 광역 분산형 음향 AI 드론 탐지 및 다중 위협 상황인식 체계

components.content: When RF fails, when radar blinds, when cameras fog — acoustics listens.

slides.notes: Opening slide. Use hero layout with large title and gradient accent line under subtitle.

slides.title: Modern Battlefield Has a Detection Gap

components.heading: RF / Jamming
components.body: Fiber-optic drones have zero RF signature. Jammers useless.

components.heading: Radar
components.body: Low RCS, terrain clutter, urban multipath = wide blind zones

components.heading: EO / IR
components.body: Fog, night, narrow FOV — fails at wide-area search

components.content: 2024: Russia deployed fiber-optic FPV drones at scale. No RF. Fully jammer-immune. This is the new normal.
components.stat: 우크라이나 전선 — 기존 RF/재머 체계 구조적 무력화

slides.notes: Emphasize the structural gap. Three equal columns above a full-width callout banner.

slides.title: A $20B Market at Its Inflection Point

components.content: The U.S. homeland is no longer a sanctuary.

slides.notes: KPI cards in 2x3 grid. Quote displayed prominently below.

slides.title: Cochl AcousticShield: The Acoustic ISR Layer
slides.subtitle: Acoustic signatures cannot be physically eliminated. Any drone in flight produces them.

components.heading: 6 Simultaneous Threat Classes
components.body: Drone + gunshots + vehicles + explosions + intrusion + voice

slides.notes: Four equal horizontal cards with numbered accent. Gradient border on cards.

slides.title: 4-Layer Acoustic ISR Architecture

components.heading: Edge Layer
components.body: 100m-interval distributed nodes, Edge AI inference, wake-on-event

components.heading: Server Layer
components.body: Metadata fusion, density-based localization (no clock sync)

components.heading: Fusion Layer
components.body: VMS dashboard, threat tracking, NATO SAPIENT API (BSI Flex 335 v2)

components.heading: Operator Layer
components.body: On-premise LLM (Gemma 3), ASR+TTS voice interface, auto-prioritization

slides.notes: Vertical stacked layers with arrow connectors. Color gradient from blue to purple top-to-bottom.

slides.title: One Network. Six Threat Classes.

components.content: 900+ background sound classes trained simultaneously → industry-leading false alarm rate

slides.notes: Clean dark table with alternating row highlight. Accent color on first column.

slides.title: Quantified. KOLAS-Verified.
slides.footer: All metrics independently verified by KOLAS-certified test authority (KOTCA)
slides.notes: 8 KPI cards in 4x2 grid. Footer bar with KOLAS certification note.

slides.title: 17 Seconds from Detection to Decision

components.label: Scenario A
components.heading: 강원 DMZ — 광섬유 FPV 드론 (RF 0건)
steps: 14 nodes detect 3 FPV drones approaching at 90km/h
"동측 4.2km, FPV 3기, 시속 90km 남하. 예상 도달 2분30초." — AI Agent

components.label: Scenario B
components.heading: 휴전선 복합 침투 — 보병+드론+궤도차량 시계열
steps: 3 separate events over 60 minutes, integrated by AI Agent

components.label: Scenario C
components.heading: 인천공항 — 유리 파괴 + 자폭 드론 동시

slides.notes: Three cards side by side. Each card shows timeline of events. AI Agent quotes highlighted.

slides.title: 18-Month R&D Roadmap

phases.label: Kickoff
phases.description: Project kickoff, acoustic DB construction, AI model v1 start

phases.label: Alpha
phases.description: AI model v1 alpha complete, 2 prototypes built, 1st self-test

phases.label: Integration
phases.description: 6 prototypes integration, model v2 training start [Progress check]

phases.label: Field Test 1
phases.description: Outdoor field test (Seoul metro), AI Agent v1 (text), SAPIENT API v1

phases.label: Full Integration
phases.description: Full system integration, AI Agent v2 (voice), field test complete

phases.label: KOLAS
phases.description: SAPIENT Test Harness verification, KOLAS test begins [Performance eval]

phases.label: Certification
phases.description: KOLAS certification pass, patent + paper, final evaluation

slides.notes: Horizontal timeline with 7 milestone markers. Budget bar below each milestone.

slides.title: Building Korea's First Acoustic ISR Layer

components.heading: National Security
components.body: First wide-area acoustic ISR for fiber-optic drone era in Korea
